title: doria perfoliata
intro: Doria perfoliata, also known as Perfoliate Willowherb, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and has been used to treat conditions like bronchitis and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Doria perfoliata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
